But the way that has worked for us is to just really understand that, like, the agentic pipelines do not need an enormous amount of hyper-specific detail because the researcher goes out and generates research questions and comes up with a pretty solid body of research and will come up with what it needs to write the article.

So my advice is think, think, think, think before you do anything, but then break them up into the writing guidelines or the overarching principles.

A guide, the kind of writing you want to do for that client, and then you have perhaps a set of rules, which are hard and fast rules, and then perhaps a post processor that says, hey, I've got a checklist of things.
Could you go back and make sure that all of these things are good and split those into separate documents?
And this, the reason I say think, think, think is because you need to think logically about the order of operations.
The writing guidelines will be applied at the draft, and then any post processing will be applied later.
So make sure they're not in conflict, that they logically flow.
Just use your editorial mindset and say, hey, what would I do first?
Something that affects the entire article or reflows entire sections, I would do that first.
Before I went and said, hey, could you specifically check to make sure that this brand name has a TM attached to it in every instant that it appears?

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Reviewing and troubleshooting Atlas Agentic workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/BJfxmAj-tewnPEVMP2zZ1izvYPMDU8HW?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Simplify Artifacts:** Agentic pipelines struggle with the complexity of monolithic artifacts (\~300 rules). Decompose them into focused documents (e.g., `writing_guidelines`, `product_matrix`) and apply specific rules via post-processors.](https://fathom.video/share/BJfxmAj-tewnPEVMP2zZ1izvYPMDU8HW?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
  - [**Isolate Variables for Testing:** To avoid breaking changes, modify only one variable per test run. Use the platform's version history to revert inputs and re-run a single step, which saves time by skipping the research phase.](https://fathom.video/share/BJfxmAj-tewnPEVMP2zZ1izvYPMDU8HW?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)
  - [**Use the Right Tools for Fact-Checking:** The pre-agentic `fact_checker` is unreliable for specific data. For accuracy, rely on the agentic `researcher` (now using Exa/Tavoli) and the `add source links` post-processor.](https://fathom.video/share/BJfxmAj-tewnPEVMP2zZ1izvYPMDU8HW?tab=summary&timestamp=2942.0)
  - [**Manage Client Expectations:** Frame the AI's value as enabling an "abundance mindset" for content, shifting focus from minor stylistic edits to the strategic advantage of producing 5–30 high-quality articles per week.](https://fathom.video/share/BJfxmAj-tewnPEVMP2zZ1izvYPMDU8HW?tab=summary&timestamp=2184.0)

## Topics

### Troubleshooting Agentic Pipelines

  - [**Problem:** The HX pipeline is inserting platform-vs-point-solution arguments into irrelevant articles (e.g., actuary coding), likely caused by conflicting instructions in the `review product integration and positioning` step.](https://fathom.video/share/BJfxmAj-tewnPEVMP2zZ1izvYPMDU8HW?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)
  - [**Solution:** Decompose monolithic artifacts into focused documents.](https://fathom.video/share/BJfxmAj-tewnPEVMP2zZ1izvYPMDU8HW?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Agents struggle to prioritize and resolve conflicts between hundreds of rules in a single artifact.](https://fathom.video/share/BJfxmAj-tewnPEVMP2zZ1izvYPMDU8HW?tab=summary&timestamp=1592.0)
      - [**Method:**](https://fathom.video/share/BJfxmAj-tewnPEVMP2zZ1izvYPMDU8HW?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
          - [**Core Principles:** Keep `writing_guidelines` concise.](https://fathom.video/share/BJfxmAj-tewnPEVMP2zZ1izvYPMDU8HW?tab=summary&timestamp=1188.0)
          - [**Specific Rules:** Isolate hard-and-fast rules in a separate artifact.](https://fathom.video/share/BJfxmAj-tewnPEVMP2zZ1izvYPMDU8HW?tab=summary&timestamp=1188.0)
          - [**Post-Processing:** Use post-processors for checklists and conditional logic (e.g., `if X mentioned, then do Y`).](https://fathom.video/share/BJfxmAj-tewnPEVMP2zZ1izvYPMDU8HW?tab=summary&timestamp=1188.0)
      - [**Example:** The Diligent team's `product_matrix` is effective because it's a structured artifact, not a post-processor. This allows the drafter to integrate product use cases organically, preventing awkward insertions.](https://fathom.video/share/BJfxmAj-tewnPEVMP2zZ1izvYPMDU8HW?tab=summary&timestamp=1808.0)

### Diagnosing Stylistic Issues

  - [**Problem:** The Outreach pipeline's agentic version produces choppy, semicolon-heavy sentences, a significant change from the standard pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/BJfxmAj-tewnPEVMP2zZ1izvYPMDU8HW?tab=summary&timestamp=1353.0)
  - [**Diagnosis:** The issue is likely a conflict in the `writing_guidelines` artifact.](https://fathom.video/share/BJfxmAj-tewnPEVMP2zZ1izvYPMDU8HW?tab=summary&timestamp=1447.0)
      - [**Hypothesis:** A rule to "remove em dashes" may be causing the agent to over-index on semicolons without explicit instructions on how to handle compound sentences.](https://fathom.video/share/BJfxmAj-tewnPEVMP2zZ1izvYPMDU8HW?tab=summary&timestamp=1484.0)
      - [**Solution:** Add explicit logic for compound sentences (e.g., "connect with commas") to guide the agent's behavior.](https://fathom.video/share/BJfxmAj-tewnPEVMP2zZ1izvYPMDU8HW?tab=summary&timestamp=1531.0)

### Fact-Checking & Hallucinations

  - [**Problem:** The `fact_checker` agent is unreliable, often failing to verify facts from paywalled articles or making unhelpful, out-of-context edits.](https://fathom.video/share/BJfxmAj-tewnPEVMP2zZ1izvYPMDU8HW?tab=summary&timestamp=2942.0)
  - [**Diagnosis:** The `fact_checker` is a pre-agentic tool with a simpler methodology (basic Perplexity searches) than the modern `researcher` (Exa/Tavoli with deep research loops).](https://fathom.video/share/BJfxmAj-tewnPEVMP2zZ1izvYPMDU8HW?tab=summary&timestamp=2942.0)
  - [**Solution:** Rely on the `researcher` and the `add source links` post-processor for accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/BJfxmAj-tewnPEVMP2zZ1izvYPMDU8HW?tab=summary&timestamp=2942.0)
      - [**Note:** The `researcher` was recently updated to better handle broken source links.](https://fathom.video/share/BJfxmAj-tewnPEVMP2zZ1izvYPMDU8HW?tab=summary&timestamp=3063.0)
      - [**Pro-Tip:** Pre-populate the `researcher` with a list of trusted sources or specific research questions to improve focus.](https://fathom.video/share/BJfxmAj-tewnPEVMP2zZ1izvYPMDU8HW?tab=summary&timestamp=3356.0)

### Client Expectation Management

  - [**Context:** The AI's ability to produce complex, high-quality content (e.g., the Clerc white paper on DSPM) is a major advantage.](https://fathom.video/share/BJfxmAj-tewnPEVMP2zZ1izvYPMDU8HW?tab=summary&timestamp=1978.0)
  - [**Framing:** Shift client focus from minor stylistic edits to the strategic value of an "abundance mindset."](https://fathom.video/share/BJfxmAj-tewnPEVMP2zZ1izvYPMDU8HW?tab=summary&timestamp=2184.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The AI enables 5–30 "shots on goal" per week, a massive increase over traditional methods.](https://fathom.video/share/BJfxmAj-tewnPEVMP2zZ1izvYPMDU8HW?tab=summary&timestamp=2184.0)
      - [**Goal:** Move conversations to higher-level strategy, helping clients leverage this new capability effectively.](https://fathom.video/share/BJfxmAj-tewnPEVMP2zZ1izvYPMDU8HW?tab=summary&timestamp=2254.0)

### Pipeline Review Process

  - [**Task:** Review pipelines in the "in review" stage to unblock the Client Ops team.](https://fathom.video/share/BJfxmAj-tewnPEVMP2zZ1izvYPMDU8HW?tab=summary&timestamp=3422.0)
  - [**Method:** Focus exclusively on editorial quality of the final output.](https://fathom.video/share/BJfxmAj-tewnPEVMP2zZ1izvYPMDU8HW?tab=summary&timestamp=3422.0)
      - [**Do:** Evaluate writing style, tone, and structure.](https://fathom.video/share/BJfxmAj-tewnPEVMP2zZ1izvYPMDU8HW?tab=summary&timestamp=3422.0)
      - [**Don't:** Analyze prompts or code.](https://fathom.video/share/BJfxmAj-tewnPEVMP2zZ1izvYPMDU8HW?tab=summary&timestamp=3422.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This provides clear, actionable feedback that the Client Ops team can translate into technical fixes.](https://fathom.video/share/BJfxmAj-tewnPEVMP2zZ1izvYPMDU8HW?tab=summary&timestamp=3422.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Bailey & Ife:** Simplify the HX pipeline's `review product integration and positioning` step to resolve conflicting instructions.](https://fathom.video/share/BJfxmAj-tewnPEVMP2zZ1izvYPMDU8HW?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)
  - [**Jenn:** Revise the Outreach pipeline's `writing_guidelines` to add explicit logic for handling compound sentences after removing em dashes.](https://fathom.video/share/BJfxmAj-tewnPEVMP2zZ1izvYPMDU8HW?tab=summary&timestamp=1531.0)
  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/BJfxmAj-tewnPEVMP2zZ1izvYPMDU8HW?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
      - [Decompose monolithic artifacts into smaller, focused documents.](https://fathom.video/share/BJfxmAj-tewnPEVMP2zZ1izvYPMDU8HW?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
      - [Use post-processors for specific rules and checklists.](https://fathom.video/share/BJfxmAj-tewnPEVMP2zZ1izvYPMDU8HW?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
      - [When testing, isolate variables and use version history to re-run single steps.](https://fathom.video/share/BJfxmAj-tewnPEVMP2zZ1izvYPMDU8HW?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)
      - [Focus pipeline reviews on editorial quality of the final output.](https://fathom.video/share/BJfxmAj-tewnPEVMP2zZ1izvYPMDU8HW?tab=summary&timestamp=3422.0)
